query:
SELECT 
  c.id, c.name, c.title, c.company, c.contactTrustTier, c.roleRelevance, c.email
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
WHERE cp.projectId = 630011
ORDER BY 
  CASE c.contactTrustTier 
    WHEN 'send_ready' THEN 1 
    WHEN 'named_unverified' THEN 2 
    WHEN 'needs_verification' THEN 3 
    ELSE 4 
  END,
  CASE c.roleRelevance 
    WHEN 'high' THEN 1 
    WHEN 'medium' THEN 2 
    WHEN 'low' THEN 3 
    ELSE 4 
  END;

WHERE cp.projectId = 630011
ORDER BY 
  CASE c.contactTrustTier 
    WHEN 'send_ready' THEN 1 
    WHEN 'named_unverified' THEN 2 
    WHEN 'needs_verification' THEN 3 
    ELSE 4 
  END,
  CASE c.roleRelevance 
    WHEN 'high' THEN 1 
    WHEN 'medium' THEN 2 
    WHEN 'low' THEN 3 
    ELSE 4 
  END;
